package.brief: HH the Amir Sheikh Tamim bin Hamad Al Thani received Pakistani Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif at the Amiri Diwan on Saturday to discuss bilateral relations and regional developments.

article.headline: HH the Amir Receives Pakistani Prime Minister at Amiri Diwan
article.body:
**Doha, Qatar** – HH Sheikh Tamim bin Hamad Al Thani received HE Mr Shehbaz Sharif, Prime Minister of the Islamic Republic of Pakistan, at the Amiri Diwan on Saturday.

The two sides reviewed bilateral relations and ways to expand cooperation between the two countries. Regional developments in the Middle East were also discussed during the meeting.

package.instagram_caption: HH the Amir Sheikh Tamim bin Hamad Al Thani received HE Mr Shehbaz Sharif, Prime Minister of Pakistan, at the Amiri Diwan on Saturday. The talks focused on bilateral relations and regional developments. #Qatar #Pakistan #Diplomacy #AmiriDiwan #BilateralRelations

package.brief: Mathaf: Arab Museum of Modern Art has opened a new exhibition titled 'Resolutions' to mark 15 years since the museum's establishment, as announced by Qatar Museums.

article.headline: Mathaf Opens 'Resolutions' Exhibition Marking 15 Years
article.body:
Mathaf: Arab Museum of Modern Art has opened a new exhibition titled 'Resolutions' to mark 15 years since the museum's establishment, Qatar Museums announced.

The exhibition runs from 10 June and is on display at the museum in Education City. According to the museum, 'Resolutions' examines Mathaf's foundation through four defining areas: its origins under Sheikh Hassan bin Mohammed bin Ali Al Thani, its exhibition history since opening in 2010, its engagement with knowledge circulation in the Arab world, and its educational programmes.

The museum said the show draws on works from its permanent collection. Entry is free for all visitors, and Qatar Museums said accompanying public talks and guided tours will be held during the exhibition period.

package.instagram_caption: Mathaf: Arab Museum of Modern Art celebrates 15 years with the new exhibition 'Resolutions', exploring its origins, exhibition history, and educational programmes. Free entry at Education City. #Mathaf #QatarMuseums #Resolutions #ModernArt #Doha #ArtExhibition
package.story_copy: Mathaf opens 'Resolutions' exhibition marking 15 years. Free entry at Education City.
package.push_notification: Mathaf opens 'Resolutions' exhibition to mark 15 years
package.video_script:

Beat 2: Explore the museum's origins under Sheikh Hassan bin Mohammed bin Ali Al Thani.
Beat 3: See works from the permanent collection.
Beat 4: Free entry at Education City. Public talks and tours available.

package.brief: The Ministry of Public Health has launched a summer mosquito-control programme using drones and biological fish-based larvicide across 18 districts, coordinated with the Ministry of Municipality and running through October.

article.headline: MoPH Launches Summer Mosquito-Control Programme Using Drones and Biological Larvicide
article.body:
The Ministry of Public Health (MoPH) has launched a summer mosquito-control programme aimed at reducing mosquito populations across 18 districts. The programme employs drones and biological fish-based larvicide, according to officials.

The initiative is coordinated with the Ministry of Municipality and will run through October. MoPH Director of Communicable Diseases stated that public-health vigilance during summer is a shared responsibility.

package.instagram_caption: The Ministry of Public Health has launched a summer mosquito-control programme using drones and biological fish-based larvicide across 18 districts. The initiative runs through October in coordination with the Ministry of Municipality. #MoPH #Qatar #MosquitoControl #PublicHealth #SummerSafety #QatarLiving

package.brief: The Qatar Education Leadership Expo 2026 concluded in Doha on 24 May, featuring sessions on school leadership, digital learning, and student wellbeing.

article.headline: Qatar Education Leadership Expo 2026 Concludes in Doha
article.body:
The Qatar Education Leadership Expo 2026 concluded in Doha on 24 May, organisers said.

The event brought together school leaders, educators and education-sector officials over its run. Organisers said the programme featured sessions on school leadership, digital learning and student wellbeing.

The expo has now ended and is no longer accepting registrations. The listing remained on the live events page after the closing date and is being updated to reflect that the event has concluded.

package.instagram_caption: The Qatar Education Leadership Expo 2026 concluded in Doha on 24 May, bringing together school leaders and educators for sessions on school leadership, digital learning, and student wellbeing. #QatarEducation #EducationLeadership #DohaEvents
package.story_copy: The Qatar Education Leadership Expo 2026 concluded in Doha on 24 May.
package.push_notification: Qatar Education Leadership Expo 2026 concludes in Doha

package.brief: Qatar Airways will resume flights to Helsinki, Finland, and Tokyo Haneda, Japan, from 15 July, expanding its global network to over 160 destinations this summer.

article.headline: Qatar Airways to Resume Flights to Helsinki and Tokyo Haneda from 15 July
article.body: Qatar Airways has announced it will resume flights to Helsinki, Finland, and Tokyo Haneda, Japan, starting 15 July. The Helsinki route will operate four times weekly, increasing to daily from 1 August. Tokyo Haneda will receive four weekly flights from 15 July, complementing the existing Tokyo Narita service. The expansion brings Qatar Airways' global network to over 160 destinations this summer.

package.instagram_caption: Qatar Airways is resuming flights to Helsinki and Tokyo Haneda from 15 July! ✈️ Helsinki will start with four weekly flights, becoming daily from 1 August. Tokyo Haneda will have four weekly flights, adding to our Narita service. Our global network now reaches over 160 destinations this summer. #QatarAirways #Helsinki #TokyoHaneda #TravelQatar #Aviation
package.story_copy: Qatar Airways resumes flights to Helsinki and Tokyo Haneda from 15 July, expanding network to over 160 destinations.
package.push_notification: Qatar Airways resumes flights to Helsinki and Tokyo Haneda from 15 July
package.video_script:
Qatar Airways is expanding its network.
Flights to Helsinki and Tokyo Haneda resume from 15 July.
Helsinki: 4 weekly flights, daily from 1 August.
Tokyo Haneda: 4 weekly flights.
Over 160 destinations this summer.
